exercises.sentence: Hoy no ___ ir al cine porque tengo mucho trabajo.
exercises.translation: Today I cannot go to the cinema because I have a lot of work.

exercises.sentence: Creo que ___ ayudarte con tu tarea de matemáticas.
exercises.translation: I think I can help you with your math homework.

exercises.sentence: ___ terminar este libro antes de que termine el mes.
exercises.translation: I can finish this book before the month ends.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ venir a mi fiesta el próximo sábado?
exercises.translation: Can you come to my party next Saturday?

exercises.sentence: Si te concentras, ___ resolver este problema fácilmente.
exercises.translation: If you concentrate, you can solve this problem easily.

exercises.sentence: ___ llamarme cuando llegues a tu casa.
exercises.translation: You can call me when you arrive home.

exercises.sentence: Mi hermano ___ nadar muy rápido en la piscina.
exercises.translation: My brother can swim very fast in the pool.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ hablar tres idiomas perfectamente.
exercises.translation: She can speak three languages perfectly.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ estacionar el coche en este lugar.
exercises.translation: You can park the car in this place.

exercises.sentence: Ayer ___ terminar todo el informe a tiempo.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I managed to finish the whole report on time.

exercises.sentence: No ___ encontrar mis llaves en toda la mañana.
exercises.translation: I could not find my keys all morning.

exercises.sentence: Finalmente ___ comprar los boletos para el concierto.
exercises.translation: Finally, I managed to buy the tickets for the concert.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ hacer la tarea anoche o tuviste problemas?
exercises.translation: Were you able to do the homework last night or did you have problems?

exercises.sentence: ___ ver la película completa a pesar del ruido.
exercises.translation: You managed to watch the full movie despite the noise.

exercises.sentence: ¿Cómo ___ encontrar esa dirección tan difícil?
exercises.translation: How were you able to find that difficult address?

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ resolver el acertijo en pocos minutos.
exercises.translation: She was able to solve the riddle in a few minutes.

exercises.sentence: El equipo ___ ganar el partido final el domingo.
exercises.translation: The team managed to win the final match on Sunday.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ viajar a Europa el verano pasado.
exercises.translation: He was able to travel to Europe last summer.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era joven, ___ correr diez kilómetros sin cansarme.
exercises.translation: When I was young, I could run ten kilometers without getting tired.

exercises.sentence: ___ ver el mar desde la ventana de mi habitación antigua.
exercises.translation: I could see the sea from the window of my old room.

exercises.sentence: Antes ___ entender bien las clases de francés.
exercises.translation: I used to be able to understand French classes well.

exercises.sentence: Cuando vivías allí, ___ ir caminando a la escuela.
exercises.translation: When you lived there, you could walk to school.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ entender lo que decía el profesor en aquella época?
exercises.translation: Could you understand what the teacher was saying back then?

exercises.sentence: Siempre ___ contar con tus amigos en ese entonces.
exercises.translation: You could always count on your friends back then.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ bailar por horas sin detenerse antes de su lesión.
exercises.translation: She could dance for hours without stopping before her injury.

exercises.sentence: Mi abuelo ___ reparar cualquier aparato electrónico.
exercises.translation: My grandfather could fix any electronic device.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ leer sin gafas cuando era más joven.
exercises.translation: He could read without glasses when he was younger.

exercises.sentence: Si tuviera más tiempo, ___ viajar a Japón.
exercises.translation: If I had more time, I could travel to Japan.

exercises.sentence: ___ hacer el trabajo mejor si tuviera las herramientas adecuadas.
exercises.translation: I could do the work better if I had the right tools.

exercises.sentence: Creo que ___ terminar esto si alguien me ayuda.
exercises.translation: I think I could finish this if someone helps me.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ venir a visitarme el próximo fin de semana?
exercises.translation: Could you come to visit me next weekend?

exercises.sentence: ___ mejorar tu nota si estudias un poco más.
exercises.translation: You could improve your grade if you study a little more.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ decirme qué hora es, por favor?
exercises.translation: Could you tell me what time it is, please?

exercises.sentence: Él ___ ser un gran músico si practicara más.
exercises.translation: He could be a great musician if he practiced more.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ resolver el problema si se lo pides.
exercises.translation: She could solve the problem if you ask her.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ obtener mejores resultados con esta estrategia.
exercises.translation: You could obtain better results with this strategy.

exercises.sentence: Mañana ___ terminar el informe después del almuerzo.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will be able to finish the report after lunch.

exercises.sentence: Espero que pronto ___ visitar a mi familia en México.
exercises.translation: I hope that soon I will be able to visit my family in Mexico.

exercises.sentence: ___ llamar a mis amigos cuando tenga señal.
exercises.translation: I will be able to call my friends when I have signal.

exercises.sentence: Cuando termines tus estudios, ___ buscar un buen empleo.
exercises.translation: When you finish your studies, you will be able to look for a good job.

exercises.sentence: Si te esfuerzas, ___ alcanzar todos tus sueños.
exercises.translation: If you strive, you will be able to reach all your dreams.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ venir a la reunión el viernes por la tarde?
exercises.translation: Will you be able to come to the meeting on Friday afternoon?

exercises.sentence: El próximo año ella ___ viajar por todo el mundo.
exercises.translation: Next year she will be able to travel around the world.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ terminar la carrera muy pronto.
exercises.translation: He will be able to finish his degree very soon.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ ver los resultados en el sitio web oficial.
exercises.translation: You will be able to see the results on the official website.
